S.FORM: === kalivu === pasu sangas tua drusaidai a cavilj a sinamazan i kamilami nua seamiszuku saka icu niamadju a kamilami.
S.PHON: === kaɭivu === pasu saŋas tua ɖusaidai a ʦaviʎ a sinamazan i kamiɭami nua səamiszuku saka iʦu niamaɉu a kamiɭami.
S.FORM: === kalivu === pasu sangas tua drusaidai a cavilj a sinamazan i kamilami nua seamiszuku saka icu niamadju a kamilami.
S.PHON: === kaɭivu === pasu saŋas tua ɖusaidai a ʦaviʎ a sinamazan i kamiɭami nua səamiszuku saka iʦu niamaɉu a kamiɭami.
